_schema_notes: This is documentation, not a real config. Every module config in this folder follows this shape. Delete/ignore this file when loading — the loader skips any file starting with underscore.

agreement.source_workbook: the .xlsx filename as it exists in /data
agreement.list_type: positive | negative  (negative ONLY for SAFTA-style modules)
agreement.default_ceiling_pct: number or null (SAFTA-style 'up to X%' ceiling)

format_family: one of: simple_bilateral | phased_calendar_year | phased_multi_component | negative_list | multi_country_ldc | text_rate | links_only | selective_concession

tariff_sheets.sheet_name: exact sheet name in the workbook
tariff_sheets.header_row: the row number (1-indexed) where column headers actually live — NOT row 1, since most sheets have title/instruction rows above the real header
tariff_sheets.import_country: the market these lines apply to, e.g. 'Iran' — used to look up countries.id
tariff_sheets.member_country: for multi-country modules only (SAPTA/GSTP/PTN/SAFTA): which member this sheet's rows belong to; null for bilaterals

columns.line_no: column letter or null if not present
columns.mfn_rate: column letter or null (some negative-list sheets have no MFN column)
columns.exclusion_flag: column letter or null — ONLY for negative_list family (e.g. SAFTA's 'Sensitive_List_Exclusion')

raw_sheet._comment: ONLY present for phased_calendar_year / phased_multi_component families with a hidden year-by-year sheet (e.g. China_Raw).
raw_sheet.year_columns: map of {year: column_letter} for each phased year
